title: Fantastic Dungoneer
description: Explore a big randomly generated dungeon crawl filled with traps and bosses. :)
body:
![title logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d0fdc397b1ca1bb4895939d4dd7b00bf81d090e8.png)
# FEATURES
### COBBLESTONE DUNGEON
- Spawns around the world, somewhat commonly
- Locator maps added to shipwrecks that lead to the dungeon
- 65+ unique-ish rooms for the dungeon to spawn
- Boss rooms that lead to the next floor
- Mostly vanilla loot pools and blocks
- trap rooms with spike trap floors

### ENVIRONMENT TRAPS
- Redstone Spike Traps that activate via redstone
- Pressure Spike Traps that activate when stepped on
- Flame Spout Traps, catches entities on fire after a short delay
- Wind Burst Trap, acts as a boost pad
- Dullstone, a block that emits 1 redstone pulse

### MUDDLE BUDS
- New type of flower that spawns in lush caves and in the dungeon
- Harvest and brew into a awkward potion to make a Muddling Potion
- The potion can be used to force mobs to aggro to each other, instead of you!


[Resource pack used in the images is Whimscape!](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape)
